channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin bottom countdown nears 50 days after BTC supply in loss passed 50%
item.description: Bitcoin supply in loss hit 50% nearly 50 days ago, mimicking the countdown to BTC price bear-market bottoms.

item.title: US indicts crypto investor over alleged $20M fraud scheme
item.description: Federal prosecutors allege the South Dakota investor used false promises to raise money, repaid earlier investors with new funds and laundered proceeds through crypto exchanges.

item.title: Airbnb CEO says X account was hacked, attacker posted AI-slop on tokenization
item.description: Brian Chesky regained control of his account and told any new crypto followers he would be a "disappointing follow".

item.title: MacOS malware hijacks Telegram sessions, targets crypto wallets: SlowMist
item.description: A macOS malware steals credentials to hijack Telegram sessions, decrypt cryptocurrency wallets or trick users into entering their wallet recovery phrases through fake applications.

item.title: Ether falls twice as hard as bitcoin and HYPE drops 10% as the chip trade unwinds
item.description: Japan's Nikkei had its worst day since March. Ether is still the only major holding a gain on the week, barely.

item.title: This $28 million ether market bet aims to profit from pure market chaos
item.description: The mega trade aims to profit from a potential surge in ether price turbulence.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs add $368M in three-day buying streak
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs attracted $79.2 million on Thursday, lifting their three-day inflow total to about $368 million as Bitcoin attempted a price recovery.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Ordinals advocate Leonidas proposes new Bitcoin client: ‘$DOG Mode’
item.description: “Over time the economic incentives will drive $DOG Mode’s adoption and force Bitcoin Core to stop gatekeeping and allow these completely valid transactions,” said Leonidas.

item.title: Bitcoin Ordinals leader proposes a way to bypass data restriction efforts
item.description: While BIP 110 wants to restrict data through a consensus change and has almost no miner support, a new DOG Mode client wants the opposite and requires no vote at all.

item.title: Crypto exchange Bybit launches in Indonesia after NOBI acquisition
item.description: The launch gives Bybit a locally operated platform in one of Asia’s largest crypto markets, home to more than 21 million crypto exchange users.

item.title: Bitcoin under $63,000 after new U.S. strike on Iran. Trump's China comment adds to uncertainty
item.description: Geopolitical tensions and renewed fears of U.S.-China frictions are weighing on risk assets, including bitcoin.

item.title: Trump Media sells Wall Street low-latency access to Trump posts
item.description: The paid Truth API is aimed at high-frequency trading firms seeking “the fastest” access to market-moving Truth Social posts, including those from US President Donald Trump.

item.title: Balaji seeks Malaysia deal, threatens exit after Network School probe
item.description: “If we are not welcome, there are many other countries that would welcome us,” said Network School founder Balaji Srinivasan in a message to the Malaysian prime minister.

item.title: Bitcoin liquidity clusters determine BTC’s price direction as futures flow fuels price
item.description: Bitcoin futures traders are propping up the current market move, while liquidation heatmap data provides hints on where BTC price may go next.

item.title: Citadel Securities invests $400M in Crypto.com at $20B valuation
item.description: Crypto exchanges have increasingly positioned themselves as bridges between digital asset markets and traditional finance.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act expected to be released today does not have Senate Democrat support, Politico reports. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBCbm5hR2tjT1h0YlYtWWlBRHJrT2dtUWtfXzlrU2NTdHpEUmREUFdPeS1wd0x5M1BFUHRZRTAyeENpTnZndHNSY3Y3enFDN1RVQlNvY3FZUVF5UVpGWlI0a1VB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act e…

item.title: Polygon CEO announces job cuts amid Coinme acquisition
item.description: The round of layoffs was part of Polygon transitioning operations to payments following a $250 million deal to acquire Coinme and Sequence in January.

item.title: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI
item.description: Source code leaked reveals how substantial portions of Suno’s training library were assembled.

item.title: Trump teleprompter operator made $100K betting on Kalshi markets tied to speeches: ABC
item.description: According to ABC News, federal regulators are investigating whether the longtime White House staffer used nonpublic information to profit from event contracts tied to President Donald Trump’s speeches.

item.title: Bitcoin outlook improves amid 6% weekly gain: Can BTC bulls push higher?
item.description: Bitcoin buyers have returned to spot, futures and ETF markets but geopolitical headwinds could quickly unravel the progress of the past two weeks.

item.title: 1inch co-founder says he was fired, announces new venture
item.description: Anton Bukov said that he no longer takes an active role at 1inch and was “fired” in 2025 after pushing for changes to the company’s management and operations.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
item.description: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.

item.title: Injective files for SEC transfer agent registration to bring securities ownership records onchain
item.description: The company said the filing would create a regulated pathway for maintaining ownership records for tokenized securities onchain.

item.title: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
item.description: Project Eleven says a new post-quantum cryptographic proof could help Bitcoin users recover wallets after Q-Day by verifying ownership.

item.title: New asset now available to trade on Robinhood Crypto. $INJ (Injective Protocol) - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1zcGhSejE3Zk5WUkNTUWUzbHRwZy1ldGJqTTlEYU84NE5mcXRtTTNDR1FKWER0Q1Zod2NoNjhCSzZpUDczRVlQeEJKSDBuZEY4U21lemJnbWZJLTFPTmRRN0pGcw?oc=5" target="_blank">New asset now available to trade…

item.title: BitPay secures Dutch licensing under MiCA, plans to expand stablecoin payments
item.description: The Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets approved BitPay’s application as a crypto-asset service provider under the Markets in Crypto-Assets requirements.

item.title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price bets on active management with first multi-token crypto ETF
item.description: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.

item.title: Mira Murati Drops Her First AI Model After Leaving OpenAI—And It's Fully Open Source
item.description: Mira Murati's Inkling won't dethrone the best Chinese open-weights models, but it gives Western developers something they haven't yet had.

item.title: JUST IN: Citadel Securities invests $400 million into cryptocurrency exchange Crypto․com at a $20,000,000,000 valuation. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5BOE42bEdadjlGaGVJTjR3SzAyX2pUTW8xRk5EYV8wTmN2NHk1Ty1EbnNLYjlFYjh0cVFFTDNsQW5uNDliSTJjX1h5SkZhMFY5a3BxdmZfNVFSbTVpVFg3UjBB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Citadel Securities invest…

item.title: Citadel Securities invests $400 million in Crypto.com, valuing exchange at $20 billion
item.description: The exchange's first institutional funding round values it at $20 billion and will fund expansion into tokenized securities and derivatives.

item.title: Visa Unveils Stablecoin Platform for Banks and Fintech Companies
item.description: The Visa Stablecoin Platform will let financial institutions integrate stablecoin payments and treasury operations into Visa's existing network.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act is not projected to be signed into law this year despite President Trump meeting with Senators today to help advance the bill. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5HYUZqdWh6T3M0ZWE0Z1R6NXh0ZndiVlVhZ1Y5TnVhbk82MjIxSFdvUWNPcVFaNVJ1UnJ3cW1OX2lITm50cTRsRmhjTU92VHlVX3VGY2Z2dThER1c3a29QLWdR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act i…

item.title: Bitcoin price dips on US stocks sell-off as Micron losses pass 30%
item.description: Bitcoin fell 1.5% from local highs amid a reversal in US stocks as markets moved from bullish US inflation cues to retail profit-taking.

item.title: XRP Can't Keep Up as Bitcoin Takes a Breather: Analysis
item.description: The post-CPI rally gave XRP a nudge. The coin barely moved. Now the chart is filling in the picture.

item.title: $BTC The script continues to play out. Since the 14th, Bitcoin has already dropped about 2%. 11 out of 12 times, we’ve seen a 5% drop after the 14th. If the pattern continues, BTC should experience at least a 5% drop from wherever it forms its pivot high. Whic - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFA0RzRmLWdwdy1VWEtIdU5jUDViZHhFMlhGUlYtc2JDUW9RbHR6OEtZalJNSUZXSi1ZZjZaR2ZTdHkzdEpNMHVlRnJhbC0wRUNsQWVoTk5OT0FKaEtHNmc?oc=5" target="_blank">$BTC The script continues to play out. …

item.title: Ethics in crypto market structure ‘really not our concern,’ says Blockchain Association CEO
item.description: A former CFTC commissioner urged lawmakers not to “kill all the hard work that we put in the rest of the bill” by making ethics a make-or-break issue on crypto market structure.

item.title: Stripe’s $53 billion PayPal bid is a high-stakes play to own the future of digital payments
item.description: If Stripe acquires PayPal, the real prize could be consumer wallets, stablecoin issuance or the infrastructure powering the next generation of digital payments.

item.title: Morgan Stanley’s E*TRADE launches spot crypto trading through Zero Hash
item.description: Eligible E*TRADE retail clients can now buy, sell and hold Bitcoin, Ether and Solana through a partnership with crypto infrastructure provider Zero Hash.

item.title: Visa backs Open USD with new stablecoin platform as Circle faces fresh competition
item.description: Visa launched a stablecoin platform that lets banks and fintechs issue, manage and settle digital dollars through its payments network.

item.title: JUST IN: $1.9 trillion T. Rowe Price launched the first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETP 👀 40.75% of the fund is in Bitcoin🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1rMTB0ai1mS0RNb2F5VGlhdXdkWXdFU0hscmdPVWxVWExndGk4a29ad0MtM3pqNVBzMVhPS3E0R1Z5ay1ubzdTMWloVUg5SEZuMndzamZXWVZJazFzMjUzZHl5cGh1VTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $1.9 trillion T. R…

item.title: Dormant Bitcoin Whale Moves $383 Million After More Than 8 Years
item.description: The wallet holding nearly 5,908 BTC since 2017 transferred its entire balance to a new address.

item.title: Keyrock acquires BlockFills trading assets to expand institutional crypto business
item.description: The deal adds institutional trading clients, derivatives expertise and regulatory licenses as Keyrock looks to deepen its presence in crypto capital markets.

item.title: T Rowe Active Crypto ETF $TKNZ is live today, first multi-token active spot ETF, also notable given T Rowe Price's legacy as stock picker (they've been around since bf WWII). Fee 75bps. Opens with $15m in assets. Here's the holdings to start which show unde - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1XOEQwYVkyUFpTekhXeHdOQjBmeWVJVy0ycGRKV1Rwc2tLR1d0SGVWWkFkdDhZOG1yS1VlSVY0ZGpNWmZBTF84UzRCNEZvQXpJM0tUVHM1S2ktalQ5clo1VndDS2I?oc=5" target="_blank">T Rowe Active Crypto ETF $TKNZ …

item.title: The Clarity Act is the most important consumer protection effort in years
item.description: Consumers should not have to wait for another crisis to get the protections they deserve, argues Summer Mersinger, CEO of the Blockchain Association.

item.title: Very crypto of us to launch $HOOD on Solana - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9UUjV3NXFRS2I4TTE1OWJPb3ZsdDRwTEpkNnM3Y1B1Q0Y1NU90VGpkRk8zQjNUYnpkby1zdThmelhVVmNqWFp0OTNKQ1RlVUZxUFN4R0VVaU9MYjA?oc=5" target="_blank">Very crypto of us to launch $HOOD on Solana…

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Strengthening defenses against AI fraud
item.description: Strengthening defenses against AI fraud

item.title: Crypto brokerage firm Alpaca raises $135 million for tokenized stock infrastructure
item.description: The company has previously cleared or held in custody roughly 94% of tokenized U.S. equities and now holds over $1.5 billion in underlying stocks.

item.title: Ledger wants AI agents to manage crypto without holding your keys
item.description: AI agents can read wallet balances and analyze portfolios but requires every sensitive action to be approved on a Ledger hardware device before it can be executed.

item.title: Status update: I am moving from the Ethereum Foundation to Ethlabs @ethlabs_org, joining the team to accelerate protocol work in the age of Ethereum adoption. In 5 years at EF Research, I have worked on research and specification of a wide range of Protoc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5DeEg0MGdjbm9nOWRISnN6X2Z2MzJESFR0QXhrUzNLRHZlTklVVzctejItREpHZGY5bFBBSEQwNTdvVHFMUWNmSFluTFJXdXJ6ejQyZ3ZyRV9Vdnhy?oc=5" target="_blank">Status update: I am moving from the Ethere…

item.title: $63,873.31 #Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: $63,873.31 #Bitcoin

item.title: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
item.description: Plus, Stripe makes a $53 billion move that could crown a stablecoin king. And Ostium gets drained of $18M in the latest DeFi exploit.

item.title: Galaxy targets institutional stablecoin yield with new DeFi vaults
item.description: The crypto financial services firm launched Galaxy Curator, a Morpho-based platform that gives Fireblocks' 2,400 institutional clients access to onchain yield strategies.

item.title: The most popular bitcoin call option has slipped by $10,000
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 18, 2026

item.title: Inside the high-stakes race to build an open financial system specifically for AI bots
item.description: The newly-convened x402 Foundation is a neutral space where competitors and payment methods can work together to create an open standard for AI agentic commerce.

item.title: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
item.description: Zyaire Wilkins allegedly procured malware hidden in video games that infected 8,000 devices and broke into 80 crypto wallets, the FBI says.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $64,000 after hitting monthly high as bears take control
item.description: Profit-taking after bitcoin hit a $65,500 monthly high combined with fresh Iranian strikes on U.S. bases sent crypto lower, with bears leading price action across most tokens.

item.title: Tether invests $20 million in Argentine neobank Ualá as it expands Latin America push
item.description: Ualá’s CEO clarified Tether is acting solely as a financial investor, citing current regional regulations preventing any immediate USDT integration.

item.title: U.S. adds four Iran central bank crypto wallets to sanctions, Tether freezes $131 million of contents
item.description: The freeze targets TRON-based addresses that held over $165 million, preventing those specific funds from being transferred or redeemed.

item.title: US Senate Unanimously Opposes Sam Bankman-Fried Pardon
item.description: The nonbinding resolution said the disgraced FTX founder should 'under no circumstances' receive clemency.
